methodology: Classification counts from gpt-pattern-audit/frequency.json cross-referenced with error-prevention-analysis.json verdicts. Rows may carry multiple error types; counts are per classification tag, not per row.

estimates.rationale: All 4 cases (POMODOR *6, Aceto 5l*2, Rulo 1kg*2, Ginger Beer 24-pack) are direct consequences of infer-from-name rule. Proposed prompt adds explicit negative examples and column precedence. Fresh extracts already show qty correction for Aceto/Rulo/POMODOR when inference is suppressed. Residual risk: model non-determinism on edge cases.

Prosciutto (€8.17→€17.06), San Pellegrino (qty 2.56→2, price 15.06→19.32), Bocconcino POMODOR price (€25→€20) are vision column-alignment failures. Strengthened column-isolation language may reduce bleed by ~1 case but cannot eliminate dense-grid OCR limitations without post-processing guards.

Single Mammafiore phantom (lot 609 fusion). Anti-phantom rules + lot rejection + no invented rows should eliminate. Recommend pairing with deterministic row-count guard in implementation for belt-and-suspenders.
All 8 are description-only spelling/character variants (Aviludo×4, Emporio×2, Bocconcino×1, Mammafiore×1). Column-faithful prompt does not target name transcription. No change expected.

aggregateProjection.note: 71% = 5 of 7 financial errors (4 pack + 1 phantom) likely eliminated; 2 column-shift cases + partial price residuals remain
